title: Build TOPIC-CATALOG.md (indicator backlog, licence/sensitivity pre-triaged)
context: The candidate topic pool for brief/dataset tasks needs a structured, maintained catalog of FAOSTAT indicators pre-screened for licence suitability, statistical suitability, and sensitivity. The initial shortlist from outreach-007 provides the seed; this task expands it into a comprehensive, structured TOPIC-CATALOG.md that feeds the triage pipeline. Each entry is a triage candidate only — it becomes a task only after passing the full gate-004.
objective: Create a comprehensive TOPIC-CATALOG.md covering candidate FAOSTAT indicators, with initial licence/sensitivity pre-screening and status (triage-pending, triaged-PASS, triaged-EXCLUDE) for each entry.
acceptanceCriteria: TOPIC-CATALOG.md contains at least 15 candidate FAOSTAT indicator entries spanning multiple FAOSTAT domains (e.g. Food Balance Sheets, Suite of Food Security Indicators, Production, Trade, Prices).

Each entry records: FAOSTAT domain, indicator code and name, indicator definition summary, reference period type, geography level, initial licence/sensitivity pre-screening notes, and status (triage-pending / triaged-PASS / triaged-EXCLUDE).
Entries explicitly flag any indicator near acute-crisis territory, advice-adjacent, or with potential third-party-data licence entanglement, marking them as triaged-EXCLUDE or escalate.
Catalog is structured so it can be updated incrementally as triage progresses; each row links to its gate artifact once triaged.
Catalog deliberately biases toward structural, long-run, low-controversy indicators (per PLAN.md scope).
output: A committed TOPIC-CATALOG.md with at least 15 pre-screened FAOSTAT indicator entries, ready to feed the triage pipeline.
